rules.rule: Shape finders (faceFinder, edgeFinder, vertexFinder, wireFinder, cornerFinder) follow a consistent pattern. Shared finder logic lives in finderCore.ts. Public API entry point is finderFns.ts. Direction utilities are in directionUtils.ts. Distance filtering uses shapeDistanceFilter.ts.
Shared query logic belongs in helpers.ts and finderCore.ts. Don't duplicate distance calculations, bounding box checks, or normal comparisons across individual finder files.
